testsuite.name: tests.mainPageTests

testcase.name: Проверка основных элементов страницы
testcase.failure: Element not found {.colCon} Expected: text "TODAY'S MATCHES" Screenshot: file:/C:/Users/garri/IdeaProjects/hltv-tests/build/reports/tests/1772572596348.0.png Page source: file:/C:/Users/garri/IdeaProjects/hltv-tests/build/reports/tests/1772572596348.0.html Timeout: 4 s.
